name: Sure Jell® Holiday Fruit and Nut Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 can crushed pineapple in juice (8 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place jars on a rack in a large pot filled with water and bring to boil. Keep boiling for 10 minutes.
2. Put flat lids in a saucepan, add enough water to cover, then bring to boil. Remove from heat and let stand in hot water until ready to use. Drain well before filling.
3. In the saucepot, mix apricots, dates, pineapple, cherries, pecans, raisins, water and spices.
4. Measure sugar into a medium bowl, scraping excess with spatula for an exact level.
5. Stir pectin into fruit mixture in the saucepot along with margarine.
6. Bring the mixture to a full rolling boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
7. Quickly stir in all of the sugar and return to a full rolling boil. Boil exactly 1 minute, stirring constantly.
8. Remove from heat and skim off any foam using a metal spoon.
9. Pour quickly into prepared jars, leaving 1/8 inch headspace. Wipe jar rims and threads.
10. Cover with two-piece lids and screw bands tightly.
11. Invert jars for 5 minutes, then turn upright. After the jars have cooled, check seals.
OR Process in a water bath as recommended by USDA.
